reference: TWO NOBLE GENTLEMEN WHO HAD A WEAKNESS FOR STRONG DRINK HAD BEEN MADE DRUNK BY THE PARTISANS OF SNETKOV AND A THIRD HAD BEEN ROBBED OF HIS UNIFORM
text: Two noble gentlemen, who had a weakness for strong drink, had been made drunk by the partisans of Snodkopf, and a third had been robbed of his uniform.
